chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Civil Reference No. S – 01 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 23.12.2022 Mr. Rahmat Ali, Advocate files power on behalf of Mst. Noreen, the plaintiff of Family Suit No.60-A of 2022, which is taken on record. Hyder Ali Pathan, the father of defendant in the said Suit is also present. Through instant Civil Reference, the learned Family Judge, Sukkur has sought appropriate order in view of the circumstances of the case as the defendant side has lost faith on him and leveled false and frivolous allegations. Learned Counsel appearing for the plaintiff (Mst. Noreen) states that he has no objection if the aforementioned Family Suit is withdrawn from the file of learned Family Judge, Sukkur; hence, considering the grounds mentioned in the instant Reference, aforementioned Family Suit is withdrawn from the file of learned Family Judge, Sukkur with direction to learned District Judge, Sukkur to assign the same to any other Civil Judge/Court for deciding the same expeditiously in accordance with law. The Civil Reference is answered in the above mentioned terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
